title: Skill pipeline meta-layer initiation (v3)
description: Stand up canonical infrastructure for the LuhTech skill pipeline: skill.schema.json, Python generator and validator, JSON-canonical / markdown-generated pattern, two CI workflows, six category subdirectories, test fixture, schemas/schema-refs.json registry entry. The deliverable that enables all subsequent skill instance authoring across the holdings. Branch scope-locked to 16 files. Supersedes d-2026-06-03-skills-meta-layer-initiation-2 (closed without merge after applier discovered schemas/schema-refs.json disk-path assumption was wrong; v1 closed for non-conforming deliverable instance and missing schema-refs from scope).

outputs.description: schemas/skill.schema.json v1.0.0 — Draft 7 canonical schema for skill instances. Six categories enum (org/dev-pipeline/comms/governance/infra/venture); four-state lifecycleStatus (draft/working-model/formalized/deprecated); three-state triggerMode (descriptive/pushy/eval-tuned); lenient pairedRule (optional); evidenceClass required on UP-promotion to formalized via if/then conditional; structured triggerContext and behavior; generationMetadata for CI drift detection.
acceptanceCriteria: File validates as Draft 7 (Draft7Validator.check_schema passes)
Required fields enforced: $schema, $id, name, description, version, category, lifecycleStatus, triggerMode, triggerContext, behavior, authority, transitions
additionalProperties: false at top level
$id pattern enforces urn:luhtech:skill:<category>:<name>:<semver>
category enum matches: org, dev-pipeline, comms, governance, infra, venture
if/then conditional on transitions: to=formalized requires evidenceClass

outputs.description: tools/skill_generate.py — Python generator. Deterministic JSON-to-SKILL.md transform. Reads skill-instance.json, validates against schemas/skill.schema.json, generates YAML frontmatter and markdown body, stamps generationMetadata footer. Refuses on schema validation failure. Output byte-stable across re-runs given identical input.
acceptanceCriteria: CLI invocation: python3 tools/skill_generate.py <path-to-skill-instance.json>
Output written to sibling SKILL.md path
Validates input against schemas/skill.schema.json before generating
Generated SKILL.md begins with YAML frontmatter and contains required fields
Footer comment block records generator version, source JSON SHA, deterministic timestamp
Re-running on unchanged input produces byte-identical output

outputs.description: tools/skill_validate.py — Python validator wrapper. Validates a skill-instance.json against schemas/skill.schema.json. Returns 0 on pass, non-zero on fail with field-path-cited errors.
acceptanceCriteria: CLI: python3 tools/skill_validate.py <path-to-skill-instance.json>
Exits 0 on valid instance, non-zero on invalid
Error output cites field path and message
Passes on the test fixture instance

outputs.description: .github/workflows/skill-instance-validation.yml — CI workflow. Runs skill_validate.py against every skill-instance.json under skills/_instances/. Triggered on pull_request when paths skills/_instances/** or schemas/skill.schema.json change.
acceptanceCriteria: Workflow file is valid YAML
Triggers on pull_request with appropriate path filter
Fails the check if any instance fails validation
Passes cleanly on the test fixture

outputs.description: .github/workflows/skill-md-generation-check.yml — CI workflow. Regenerates SKILL.md from skill-instance.json for every skill and diffs against committed SKILL.md. Fails if drift detected. Enforces the JSON-canonical / MD-generated invariant mechanically.
acceptanceCriteria: Workflow file is valid YAML
Triggers on pull_request with appropriate path filter
Regenerates and diffs every committed SKILL.md against generator output
Fails on any drift; passes cleanly on the test fixture

outputs.description: skills/_instances/ directory structure. Six category subdirectories with .gitkeep: org, dev-pipeline, comms, governance, infra, venture. Plus _test-fixture/fixture-skill/ containing the bootstrap test instance.
acceptanceCriteria: All six category directories exist with .gitkeep files
skills/_instances/_test-fixture/fixture-skill/ contains skill-instance.json and SKILL.md

outputs.description: .refsignore append — adds skills/_instances/** so refs-check does not attempt to index skill instances as schemas.
acceptanceCriteria: .refsignore contains a line matching skills/_instances/**
refs-check passes on this branch with no false positives on skill instances

outputs.description: skills/_instances/_test-fixture/fixture-skill/ — minimal valid skill instance proving the generator, validator, and CI work end-to-end. Includes skill-instance.json and SKILL.md. Not a behavioral skill; purely a CI fixture.
acceptanceCriteria: skill-instance.json validates against schemas/skill.schema.json
SKILL.md matches generator output byte-for-byte
Re-running the generator produces byte-identical SKILL.md
skill-instance-validation.yml passes on this fixture
skill-md-generation-check.yml passes on this fixture

outputs.description: schemas/schema-refs.json registry update. Adds skill entry to schemas section (alphabetical between service-graph-venture-edge and tech-stack). Prepends changelog entry version 1.27.0 Added: skill v1.0.0. Bumps meta.version 1.26.0 to 1.27.0 and meta.lastUpdated.
acceptanceCriteria: schemas/schema-refs.json contains skill entry with id, file, version, description
meta.version is 1.27.0
meta.changelog[0] documents skill v1.0.0 addition
refs-check passes on this branch

outputs.description: schemas/_instances/deliverables/d-2026-06-03-skills-meta-layer-initiation-3.json — this deliverable's own instance, self-recorded per deliverable.schema.json v1.1.0.
acceptanceCriteria: File validates against deliverable.schema.json v1.1.0
lifecycleState transitions S4-authored to S6-staged to S7-merged as PR progresses
Final state captures commitSha and prUrl

preMerge: Schema is valid Draft 7: python3 -c 'from jsonschema import Draft7Validator; import json; Draft7Validator.check_schema(json.load(open("schemas/skill.schema.json")))' exits 0
Validator passes on fixture: python3 tools/skill_validate.py skills/_instances/_test-fixture/fixture-skill/skill-instance.json exits 0
Generator SHA-stable roundtrip on the fixture: re-running produces byte-identical SKILL.md
Deliverable instance validates against schemas/deliverable.schema.json v1.1.0 with forbidden-audit-paint-names resolved from schemas/_definitions/
schemas/schema-refs.json valid JSON with skill entry at v1.27.0
postMerge: main shows skill entry registered in schemas/schema-refs.json at v1.27.0
main shows schemas/skill.schema.json present at v1.0.0
main shows skills/_instances/ directory tree with all six category subdirectories
Fixture instance and generated SKILL.md present on main and re-validatable

transitions.trigger: Spec authored after v2 closure; substrate re-read of actual repo layout (schemas/schema-refs.json, schemas/_instances/deliverables/, schemas/_definitions/forbidden-audit-paint-names.schema.json) before authoring v3

notes: Supersedes d-2026-06-03-skills-meta-layer-initiation-2 (closed at applier runtime when schemas/schema-refs.json was expected at repo root). v1 closed for non-conforming deliverable instance and missing schema-refs scope. v3 authored after explicit substrate read of actual repo layout. Root cause of three prior iterations: chat-side authoring from inference rather than verbatim substrate reads of the actual repo filesystem. The skill the pipeline is meant to enable (dev-pipeline/substrate-before-write) is the exact discipline that would have prevented this. Work product (schema, generator, validator, CI workflows, test fixture, .refsignore append) is verbatim carry-over from v1 and v2; only the deliverable instance metadata, the schemas/schema-refs.json paths in the applier, and the patch_schema_refs.py path constant changed.
